title: Is the entry expired?
prompt_md:
Implement `is_expired(entry, now)` returning a boolean.

An entry like `{"value": v, "expires_at": t}` is expired when `now >= entry["expires_at"]`. Return `True` if expired, `False` otherwise.
hints: Expiry is inclusive: at exactly expires_at the entry is already expired.
Return the boolean result of the comparison directly.
reference_solution:
def is_expired(entry, now):
    return now >= entry["expires_at"]
